title: The Art Of Touch An Online Introduction To Massage
company: the passionate teaching team at the Jing Institute, this uplifting mini session gives you a powerful introduction to the foundations of massage. In a supportive space, you will learn simple, effective techniques you can use immediately to boost wellbeing for yourself and those you care about. This is not just relaxation; it is your first taste of a world where mindful touch, creativity and clinical skill come alive. Whether you are curious, craving something new, or exploring a future in massage therapy, this lively online experience is the perfect place to begin. With expert guidance from Jing Directors Rachel Fairweather and Meghan Mari, you will feel inspired, energised and supported as you learn, connect and unwind. Everyone is welcome and no experience is needed.
description: Company:Jing Institute of Massage and Complementary Medicine(Website)
content_warnings: This is a professional massage workshop where participants will have the option to remove clothing for their turn on the massage table
